dialogue1.phrase: Oops… ehhh. That doesn't look good.

dialogue2.phrase: A bug has appeared in the project!

dialogue3.phrase: Now you need to solve the problem so that development can continue quickly.

dialogue4.phrase: Or trust your team to solve the problem on their own…

dialogue5.phrase: No pressure. The system is only partially on fire.

dialogue6.phrase: Bugs appear when your team tries to adapt or modify the system that already existed in the project.

dialogue7.phrase: And we know that understanding an unknown system, especially when there's no documentation, is harder than a humanoid robot walking.

dialogue8.phrase: To fix the bug, you'll need to answer a question related to the project's system by pressing the bug button on the contract page.

dialogue9.phrase: Think carefully! In programming, doing things too fast usually creates… another bug.
